Patti Smith at St. Marks Church in 1971 →

December 28, 2025  ·  #link #linkblog

My Thoughts:

Patti Smith is a cultural icon. Which means that if you look around the Lower East Side even today 50 years later you will see Patti Smiths of all ages and varieties.

I love how she starts off very shaky and ends with a roar.
